Client 2: Mostly kids, yes. But the number is 3.
Advisor: Perfect. One admin thing—how are you engaging with an advisor going forward? Are you looking for an ongoing relationship where we manage and advise, versus just a one-time plan?
Client 1: Ongoing. We want an RIA (registered investment advisor) setup, not just a one-off plan.
Advisor: Okay—thank you. And just so I’m not mixing terms: that means you’d want us acting as your registered investment advisor, with ongoing advice and management, right?
Client 2: Yes, RIA (registered investment advisor).
